title: Vanilla X MC
description: This modpack is based on a Vanilla + experience ,it extends on base features and ands extra QOL feature plus extra mechanics
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07b16a8022699025b26b63aedd031c077b9120e3.png)


## This modpack is based on a Vanilla + experience 
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### It extends on base features and ands extra QOL feature plus extra mechanics


This modpack wishes to extend on the vanilla game without starying into custom machanics and new item that fall out of the vanilla feel of the game ,it is built for players who love the feel of true vanilla Minecraft but want a world that’s smoother, smarter, and more alive. It adds carefully selected quality-of-life improvements, light world-building enhancements, subtle visual upgrades, and performance optimizations—without overwhelming the original style or gameplay loop.

Everything is designed to blend seamlessly with the base game. No clutter, no power creep, no systems that feel out of place. Just a cleaner, more polished version of Minecraft that stays faithful to the classic experience while making mining, exploring, building, and surviving more satisfying than ever.


PS : Check gallery 
   :Lite shader (Makeup edit) was used
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### Performance


```
- Sodium
- sodium extra / extra information
- reeses sodium options
- sodium dynamic lights (lamb dynamic lights)
- entity culling / more culling /  cull leaves
- lithium / noisium / indium 
- world threadeder / thread tweak / C2ME / threadten
- immedietly fast / ferrit core / modern fix / smartbrainLIb
```

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### QOL Features


```
- mouse tweaks / smooth scrolling / inventory HUD +
- Easy anvil , enchantable , magic , shulker boxes
- resourify / EMF / ESF / ETF
- accurate block place ment / bridging mod / bedrock placement
- Xaero's minimap + world map / 
```

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### Sound rehaul 


```
- Sound remastered 
- " SOUNDS " by mru 
- Ambient sounds
- melody by mru
```

Test Bench

- Laptop : victus 15
- CPU    : Intel I5 12450H (8 cores , 12 threads / 8 performance cores, 2 effeciency cores)
- GPU    : Nvidia GTX 1650 (Mobile (cause of laptop)) (50 watt tdp)
- RAM    : 16gb            (8x8 3200mhz sodimms,Samsung)
- Screen : 1080 x 1920     (144hrz) (uncapped for tests)
